name: tab-triage-dashboard
description: Full-page tab manager with sorting, filtering, grouping, and search to triage 1000+ tabs.

scripts.zip: npm run zip:firefox && npm run zip:chrome
scripts.zip:firefox: cp manifest.firefox.json manifest.json && zip -r -FS tab-triage-dashboard-firefox.zip manifest.json background.js triage.html triage.js utils.js triage.css icons/ -x '*.DS_Store' && rm manifest.json
scripts.zip:chrome: cp manifest.chrome.json manifest.json && zip -r -FS tab-triage-dashboard-chrome.zip manifest.json background.js triage.html triage.js utils.js triage.css icons/ -x '*.DS_Store' && rm manifest.json
scripts.lint: cp manifest.firefox.json manifest.json && zip -r -FS /tmp/tab-triage-dashboard-lint.zip manifest.json background.js triage.html triage.js utils.js triage.css icons/ -x '*.DS_Store' && rm manifest.json && addons-linter /tmp/tab-triage-dashboard-lint.zip --boring --warnings-as-errors; EXIT=$?; rm -f /tmp/tab-triage-dashboard-lint.zip; exit $EXIT
